name: nano-banana-all
description: Generate and edit images using Google's Nano Banana models (Gemini image generation). Supports versions 1, 1-pro, and 2 with text-to-image, image-to-image editing, and 1K/2K/4K resolution.

name: openai-whisper
description: Transcribe audio files using OpenAI Whisper / GPT-4o transcription. Supports mp3, mp4, m4a, wav, webm with multiple models and output formats including subtitles (srt, vtt).
